subject: Project Management
title: Scrum 1.0 vs Scrum Today
description: A fast breakdown of Scrum 1.0 vs Scrum Today for builders.

hook.text: The original 1995 Scrum was prescriptive. Today's Scrum Guide is deliberately minimal.

buildup.text: Early Scrum specified burndown charts, story points, and velocity. The 2020 guide removed them.

discovery.text: The guide evolved from 'do this' to 'achieve this' — allowing teams to find their own way.

twist.text: Some practitioners mourn the old specificity. Others celebrate the freedom.

climax.text: Scrum's evolution mirrors its own philosophy: inspect, adapt, and simplify.

punchline.text: The framework practices what it preaches.

quiz.question: How did the 2020 Scrum Guide change from earlier versions?
options: It became more minimal, removing prescriptive practices
